headline: Why Dow stock fell 10% on Friday
summary: Dow stock fell over 10% on Friday as energy and other commodities names fell sharply as oil prices cratered following news the Strait of Hormuz would reopen.

headline: How The LyondellBasell (LYB) Story Is Shifting With Supply Shocks And Dividend Reset
summary: The updated analyst fair value estimate for LyondellBasell Industries has shifted from about US$51.06 to roughly US$73.59 per share, providing a new reference point for how the stock is being framed. This change is consistent with recent research in which several firms have moved ratings higher, raised targets into the high US$60s to low US$80s range, and reassessed how supply disruptions, petrochemical margins, and the dividend reset factor into valuation. Read on to see how different...

headline: S&P 500, Nasdaq 100, Russell 2000 Smash Records As Hormuz Reopens: What's Moving Markets Friday?
summary: U.S. stocks surged to fresh all-time highs on Friday after Iran announced the full reopening of the Strait of Hormuz for commercial vessels.

raw.headline: S&P 500, Nasdaq 100, Russell 2000 Smash Records As Hormuz Reopens: What's Moving Markets Friday?
raw.summary: U.S. stocks surged to fresh all-time highs on Friday after Iran announced the full reopening of the Strait of Hormuz for commercial vessels.

headline: Iran Declares Strait Of Hormuz Open To All Vessels: Crude Plunges 14%, Airlines And Cruise Stocks Soar
summary: Iran's Foreign Minister declared the Strait of Hormuz fully open to commercial shipping. Crude oil plunged nearly 14%. Airlines and cruise lines surged.

raw.headline: Iran Declares Strait Of Hormuz Open To All Vessels: Crude Plunges 14%, Airlines And Cruise Stocks Soar
